name: Thunderwave
description: A wave of thunderous force sweeps out from you. Each creature within 15 feet must make a Constitution saving throw. On a failed save, a creature takes 2d8 thunder damage and is pushed 10 feet away from you. On a successful save, the creature takes half as much damage and isn't pushed.
notes: Area effect — all creatures within 15 ft (1 grid cell) of caster
Constitution save for half damage; full failure also pushes 10 ft away
Push mechanic noted — engine push support tracked in spell-mechanics-proposals.md
